  A.PIANO 1: A3+C4+F4+D5@4>6^80 C5@9>2^80 A#3+G4@14>7^80 C3+E4@15>4^56 A4@19>5^80 A3@24>13^80 F3+F4+G4@25>16^56 C3@35>3^80 F2+F3@46>5^104 C5+C6@52>2^104 F#2+F#3+D5+A5+D6@56>3^104 B2+D#5+D6@62>4^104
@103 [Edim]
  A.PIANO 1: G2+E3+E5+A#5+C6+E6@3>13^104 D#6@4>1^56 A#3+C4+E4@13>2^104 F5+C#6+D6+F6@19>1^104 C2+F#5+D#6+F#6@23>4^104 G5+E6+G6@29>2^104 A#3+C4+E4@33>2^104 G3@34>2^80 G2+E5+A#5+C6+E6@44>6^104 E3@45>2^80 G3+A#3+C4+E4@54>1^80 F5+F6@59>1^104 C2@63>1^104 F#5+F#6@64>3^104
@104 [F7]
  A.PIANO 1: G5+G6@5>2^104 A#3+E4+C7@9>3^104 C4+C6@10>2^104 C4@15>4^80 A3+F4+C7@20>3^104 B6@21>1^80 A6@25>4^104 F6@30>2^104 A6@34>3^104 F6@36>3^104 A6@38>6^104 A4+F5@39>2^104 C5+F6@40>5^104 C6@45>1^80 F4+C5+A5@49>2^80 F5@55>1^104 C4+F4+A4@59>11^104
@105 [D#m7 | Edim]
  A.PIANO 1: C5@1>3^104 A4@5>1^104 F5@6>3^104 A5@11>2^104 D#4@15>3^104 F#3+A3+C4+C5+C6@16>3^104 D5@17>1^56 C#5+C#6+D#6@21>4^104 F#2+C#3+D#3+D5+A5+D6@26>3^104 D#6@30>4^104 B2+D#5@31>5^104 G2+E3+E5+A#5+C6+E6@36>12^104 A#3+E4@46>2^104 C4@47>1^104 F5+F6@52>1^104 C2+F#5+F#6@56>4^104 D#6@57>3^80 G5+E6+G6@62>2^104
@106 [C7 | Am]
  A.PIANO 1: A#3+C4+E4@2>3^104 G2+E3+E4+C5+E5@13>5^104 A#3+C4+E4@23>2^104 F4+F5@28>1^104 C2+F#4+F#5@33>3^104 G4+E5+G5@38>2^80 A#3+C4+E4+C5+C6@43>5^104 C4@49>20^80 F4+B5@53>4^80 A3@54>14^56 C6@55>6^104 A5@60>3^80 F5@64>3^104
@107 [F]
  A.PIANO 1: A5@5>4^104 F5@10>4^104 C5@15>2^80 A4@20>4^80 F4@25>2^80 A3@30>11^104 C4@35>6^80 F4@40>3^80 A4@45>2^80 C4@49>4^104 F3+A3@50>3^104 F4@55>2^104 A4@60>2^104
@108 [C#dim | C#]
  A.PIANO 1: C5@1>3^104 E2+C#4+G4+A4+C#5@7>12^80 G3+A3+C#4@17>1^80 D4+D5@23>1^104 A1+E5@27>5^104 E4+G4@28>13^56 C#5@33>13^80 C#4@37>1^80 G3+A3@38>2^80 C3@44>2^32 D2+D3+F4+D5@48>2^80 F4+C#5@53>10^80 F3+D4+D5@58>4^80 G#4@62>3^80
@109 [Aaug | C#dim]
  A.PIANO 1: A3+D4+F4+A4@3>2^80 A6@9>5^104 F6@13>3^104 D4+F4+A4@14>3^80 D6@18>1^104 C#4+G4+A4+A5+C#6@24>13^80 E4+C#5@34>2^80 D6@39>2^104 G4+C#5+G5+E6@44>11^104 A4@45>1^80 C#6@49>4^80 A3+C#4+G4@54>2^80 A3@60>7^80
@110 [Dm | Gm]
  A.PIANO 1: D3+F5+A5+D6@1>4^104 F5@5>3^32 C#6@6>3^80 C4+D4+F4+A5+D6@10>7^104 A3+F5@11>6^80 C3+F5+A5+D6@21>1^104 A3+C4+D4+F4@31>2^104 G#4@33>2^32 A#1+D4+G4+A#4+D5@42>14^104 A#2@43>3^104 F3+A#3@53>3^104 C#5@59>3^104 B2+G#3+D4+G#4+D5@64>4^104
@111 [Dm | D7]
  A.PIANO 1: E5@5>3^104 G#3+D4@10>3^104 B3+D5@11>3^104 C3+A3+F4+A4+D5@22>7^104 G3@23>2^56 C5@27>2^104 A3+C4+F4@33>2^104 A4+A5@39>3^104 D2+A#4+F#5+A#5@44>9^104 F#3+C4+D4+A4+F#5+A5@55>6^104
@112 [Bm7 | F]
  A.PIANO 1: F4+B4+A5@2>8^104 G3+B3+D4@3>6^80 G5@8>8^104 G#3+B3+F4@13>6^80 D4+F5@14>5^104 B4@19>4^80 A3+C4+D4+F4+D5@25>5^104 C5@30>1^80 D5@32>3^80 C5@34>3^80 C3+A#3+E4+G4@37>8^104 A4@44>7^104 F4@50>17^104 F3+A3@51>15^104 C3@64>2^104
@113 [F | A] (grid:32)
  A.PIANO 1: F2@5>2^80 C3@7>1^80 A3@8>1^104 F4@9>2^80 A4@10>1^80 C5@11>1^80 F5@12>1^80 F5@13>1^80 A5@14>14^104
